textByHashes.1c1c5ac343e3662e051eeab65949c9eae74ac5cd: Oh, jester! Do not disturb the Burgher, he is busy with matters of import.
textByHashes.bca8c628a571b55d4e05c68128c5515e43598c42: What are you doing in Neitiznot, outlander?
textByHashes.bdfc4d8da54d7ffa148884192da1e8bf45c21375: Then you should get back on a ship and sail to Jatizso then, fool. You will need to ask Maria to ferry you back to Rellekka first.
textByHashes.ed93e24aac7509ff3c320004c30c77f227efde02: I can be ready in two days.
textByHashes.63946309ca596d2ae9923c90bb206cac8b9ba1d6: How many militia have you trained?
textByHashes.8e0969f05aa470a09765234ada818ae77aaba0b2: More shields will be completed by noon.
textByHashes.ce2fd2b83c5153a535676f67cd0b12132527d85c: I will finish their armour tomorrow
textByHashes.87271f3dc266e44c919bba514c79a16d29c42a5e: I will fix them as soon as I can.
textByHashes.4ca62e6cd009caf42697a8985a9915481b90ca18: There are a few building projects that could do with a strong extra hand.
textByHashes.e5f3453723dc4ba5b064974fcaf28f7c02db95f3: The bridges to the troll islands need repairing if we are to send a party over. First of all, we will need eight lengths of rope; maybe could assist me with this.
textByHashes.2b1614db2d6c438d11ec0007be00aab6cefb7899: It's quite simple really. Gather some yak hair and take it to the spinning wheel in the south-east of the village.
textByHashes.04faf9c3acfebd493fa2a79de8547edd0ba121cb: There you will be able to spin the yak hair you have gathered into strong lengths of rope.
textByHashes.41f6d746eacfb81a4a81626033580f0d2d52ef84: You don't have space for the Burgher's reward.
textByHashes.940b1af32b0b322f366eb3ae056b0acbec4f181e: Ah, excellent quality rope. Good work, .
textByHashes.80185a9fe366075dbd1ff23aab44fd27796c0099: Good work, we will need that rope later. Put it somewhere safe for the time being would you?
textByHashes.c5641d29e05add1a1e8c53d51cf843901513a363: I require eight arctic pine logs, which have been split in two. Arctic pines grow around the village and there is a 'Woodcutting stump' in the centre of the village you can split the logs on.
textByHashes.473216ad892aced67d32b5c72d98913a5075b821: Once you have eight pieces of rope and eight split logs I will explain how you can use them to repair the bridges that the trolls attacked a few days ago.
textByHashes.52bae637f631c0f12568fe8baf5a157ef70e8043: Hello again, do you have the eight split logs that I asked you to make?
textByHashes.2babd071ab64c50ef0165c25700eaecbf24861c5: Good work. Now that you have both the rope and split logs I shall explain how you go about repairing our bridges.
textByHashes.b6e0b7e84293d1402cd763176b2de6db8a0b97e8: I would like you to repair the two bridges leading to the northern isle.
textByHashes.18e36ce430c9520449a62606acdeac5da7a06ef6: To repair each bridge you will need four pieces of rope, four split logs and a knife.
textByHashes.7d533dc4cca4720b333657cb5b320fc7397631b6: Do you need any help with the bridge repairs?
textByHashes.254204b2d1484f8793c06b665bc7de41b2857516: You will the need the split arctic pine logs and the coils of rope you collected earlier. You will need one for of each per bridge. You will also require a knife.
textByHashes.420eb3e7aeba84e6c1f26d9b96c76beb102da508: If you leave the west gate you will find a couple of bridges that lead to a thin strip of island north of this one. Both bridges that need to be repaired lead northwards from this island; one to the west and
textByHashes.b5cd608eafe4699896dcf2a880024daadaf886d2: another near the centre. There is another bridge to the East, but you don't need to worry about that one.
textByHashes.996f772e6e5b5c6735115245aa4be1cc5b80dc43: We are a generous folk, over here on Neitiznot.
textByHashes.7aae36cfa974d485e6c0d5e673d71b7aa80359bd: Good work! Now that you have repaired our bridges I can make the final preparations for our assault on the troll caves.
textByHashes.94fe728706df9bea9600d9240dbf62a58815980d: Have you found out about Jatizso's plans yet, ?
textByHashes.55292ff19e00747c0d1db8b9be9e824d0d9235fd: I think the Burgher could do with a laugh right now. Why don't you ask him?
textByHashes.f3cced5e1fe0f61b6a19406576f323e3cc386b2e: He seems honourable and courageous to me.
textByHashes.ccfef01409ef6ad77743bd1ec7a59f776e8245cf: She seems honourable and courageous to me.
textByHashes.2fc330eda2132dbe92772234003b1f5d899e76b1: Well I trust Mord Gunnars, and he works for the King.
textByHashes.a4e3300d86f000c87e62339990c2b3c8255b5ebd: Yes, well. So are your militia ready?
textByHashes.0888a4b10fa170f47446808d46ff84751b2d5213: Then I shall sail the potions to them tonight.
textByHashes.1a95d3c79331d7a372d6c1f9c86894ef999ddbc0: You should speak to Fridleif or the Burgher about crafting yourself the traditional armour of a Fremennik warrior.
textByHashes.47d6bd8a923d44d004955cc30ff7de42e7c4134a: I offer to act as guide to during the traditional rites.
textByHashes.fb8d2b2d248b26b366452ee197f7616d92da45f1: Firstly, you must equip yourself with the traditional armour of Neitiznot.
textByHashes.4ac27d2cb7ae33622030fb30b3559ddb8a6c8771: You will need to cull several yaks in order to craft yourself a suit of yak-hide armour.
textByHashes.f995ef975a40eecda545e82986bc153e5d998935: Once you have a few pieces of yak-hide, return to me and I shall cure them for you.
textByHashes.8a43af37055efb187ec5050bc72038a6daa15f09: Then I will give you instruction on how this hide may be crafted into a thick jerkin, ideal for protecting yourself from the granite clubs that the trolls of these isles prefer to wield.
textByHashes.fd7e9e0f5feef7c5a24d5a63a4ae27aadcfbcf2b: You will need to cull several yaks in order to craft yourself a suit of yak-hide armour. There is a fenced-in field to the west of the village where yaks roam freely. Once you have a few pieces of yak-hide, return to me
textByHashes.e47ed1d9a56a38d33e941d116faa743d0eba6ad1: I will cure yak-hide for a fee of 5 gp per hide.
textByHashes.e5a3b62b1beeacf6f28dc0bf2dd46299fc4a25f6: You don't have enough gold to pay me!
textByHashes.c494be494d4dcb7f7ce93f3bc81937563c786842: Other types of leather? Why would you need any other type of leather?
textByHashes.5bdbbd3af321d68c7b19bbda25fd0b84ceb1590c: and I shall cure them for you. Once cured, a normal needle and thread will be needed to craft the yak leather in the same way as any other leather.
textByHashes.d139b1e0f325e11525c21e4ce2991b74250dd991: You will need two arctic pine logs, a length of rope, some bronze nails and a hammer.
textByHashes.0b0d6645158881c3c57211272fa23e19a6e0340b: When you have all of these you should find the tree stump outside of my hut. You will be able to hammer together the shield.
textByHashes.2c0ffd9bd40da8bdd91d4e8f47e1e1ec33b1d972: Thakkrad whispers in your ear. Just repeat what I say.
textByHashes.bf3decae955eeb64f7dbcb17cafefe9397ce7062: 'I, , swear to uphold the virtues of courage and honour.'
textByHashes.0c020fe4ab6fa8b778a783b2ed79d54831f06a37: Welcome to the clan of Neitiznot; you shall be welcome in this township forever more.
textByHashes.b78c7815b4fc7efe799a1677c4641bf0e4f6880d: Fridleif's scouts have reported that the militia have entered the caves to the east of the northern isle. They are waiting for you to lead them in battle.
textByHashes.2a0de634c40d1ee87656d9d235ac665f8b29a064: That I have sir, we should be able to mine 'runite' once again; now that I have repaired the north-eastern bridge.
textByHashes.60c7947c44c1d9236deb20866c0b1ac8fdad3d01: Thank you for leading the Burgher's militia against the Troll King.
textByHashes.60144bd3bb004822ce10facb1a80ba3428b86c2f: Now that the trolls are leaderless I have repaired the bridge to the central isle for you as best I can.
textByHashes.38e79c058df6e779e06d749c9ac12ec99e5980fc: Yes, you should be able to mine runite there if you wish.
textByHashes.8c0dd20d69e35625db065ff1cb4a14c259321a16: You have no yak-hide to cure.
textByHashes.800396b39b0c20195a41da1b3ad15bf2fd64a218: You won't find anyone else who can cure yak-hide.
